name: Privilege application boundaries
description: Verify that manifest privileges restrict direct hardware API binds.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper privilege application boundaries settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Privilege application boundaries. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `manifest_privs=restricted` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "manifest_privs=restricted", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-ACP-04", "cost": "LOW", "estimated_time_hours": 4}
